_doc: Tenant license/allocation snapshot. The tenant Robot Unit pool is fully consumed (Available 0 of 25). The reporting user's Personal Automation monthly quota is NOT exhausted, and per-user Robot Unit allocation is not the blocker — so branches 1 (personal quota) and 2 (per-user RU) are ruled out. The limiting resource is the tenant-wide Robot Unit pool.

PerUserAllocations.Note: user has headroom; blocked only by the empty tenant pool
